title: pelargonium crassicaule
intro: Pelargonium crassicaule is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the crassicaule pelargonium or rough-leaved geranium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium crassicaule include reducing symptoms of colds and flu, relieving sore throats, and reducing inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules and tinctures.
